_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="run_in_terminal"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **run_in_terminal**</summary>

**Input:**

- command: `$devices = @('ThingStructureHydroponicsStation','ThingStructureLiquidTankSmallInsulated','ThingStructureGroundBasedTelescope','ThingStructureAutolathe','ThingStructureAreaPowerControl','ThingStructureLiquidTurboVolumePump','ThingStructureManualHatch','ThingStructureBatteryMedium','ThingStructureSleeperVerticalDroid','ThingStructureLogicBatchSlotReader','ThingStructureSolarPanel45','ThingModularDeviceSliderDiode2','ThingStructureLiquidValve','ThingModularDeviceSwitch','ThingStructurePassiveLargeRadiatorGas','ThingStructureOverheadShortCornerLocker','ThingModularDeviceEmergencyButton3x3'); $json = Get-Content 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\Stationeers\Stationpedia\Stationpedia.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $output = @(); foreach($d in $devices) { $entry = $json.pages | Where-Object {$_.Key -eq $d}; if($entry) { $logics = @{}; foreach($l in $entry.LogicInsert) { if($l.LogicName -match 'LogicType\.(\w+)') { $logics[$matches[1]] = @{access=$l.LogicAccessTypes} } }; $slots = @(); if($entry.Slots) { foreach($s in $entry.Slots) { $slots += @{name=$s.SlotName; type=$s.SlotType} } }; $output += @{device=$d; title=($entry.Title -replace '<[^>]+>',''); logics=$logics; slots=$slots; logicCount=$logics.Count} } }; $output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\batch11_logic_data.json' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "Extracted logic data for $($output.Count) devices" -ForegroundColor Green; $output | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.title): $($_.logicCount) logic types" }`
- explanation: `Extract logic types from Stationpedia.json for batch-11 devices`
- isBackground: `false`

</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="run_in_terminal"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **run_in_terminal**</summary>

**Input:**

- command: `$devices = @('ThingStructureHydroponicsStation','ThingStructureLiquidTankSmallInsulated','ThingStructureGroundBasedTelescope','ThingStructureAutolathe','ThingStructureAreaPowerControl','ThingStructureLiquidTurboVolumePump','ThingStructureManualHatch','ThingStructureBatteryMedium','ThingStructureSleeperVerticalDroid','ThingStructureLogicBatchSlotReader','ThingStructureSolarPanel45','ThingModularDeviceSliderDiode2','ThingStructureLiquidValve','ThingModularDeviceSwitch','ThingStructurePassiveLargeRadiatorGas','ThingStructureOverheadShortCornerLocker','ThingModularDeviceEmergencyButton3x3'); $json = Get-Content 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\Stationeers\Stationpedia\Stationpedia.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $output = @(); foreach($d in $devices) { $entry = $json.pages | Where-Object {$_.Key -eq $d}; if($entry) { $logics = @{}; foreach($l in $entry.LogicInsert) { if($l.LogicName -match 'LogicType(\w+)') { $logics[$matches[1]] = @{access=$l.LogicAccessTypes} } }; $modeStrings = @(); if($entry.ModeInsert) { foreach($m in $entry.ModeInsert) { $modeStrings += "$($m.LogicName)=$($m.LogicAccessTypes)" } }; $slots = @(); if($entry.Slots) { foreach($s in $entry.Slots) { $slots += @{name=$s.SlotName; type=$s.SlotType} } }; $output += @{device=$d; title=($entry.Title -replace '<[^>]+>',''); logics=$logics; modes=$modeStrings; slots=$slots; logicCount=$logics.Count; prefabHash=$entry.PrefabHash} } }; $output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\batch11_logic_data.json' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "Extracted logic data for $($output.Count) devices" -ForegroundColor Green; $output | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.title): $($_.logicCount) logic types, Modes: $($_.modes.Count)" }`
- explanation: `Re-extract logic types with correct regex pattern`
- isBackground: `false`

</details></tool-use>

**Input:**

- description: `Complete batch-11 device review`
- prompt:

```
You are completing a device logic type review for batch-11. Your task is to create a complete JSON output file with ALL logic type descriptions for 17 devices.

I've already extracted the logic data. Here's what you need to do:

1. For each device in the batch, create a complete device entry with descriptions for ALL logic types
2. Use these standard descriptions for generic types (copy exactly):
   - Power: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered."
   - On: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Device on/off state."
   - RequiredPower: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+ W", "description": "Power draw in watts."
   - Temperature: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+ K", "description": "Temperature in Kelvin."
   - Pressure: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+ kPa", "description": "Pressure in kPa."
   - Open: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Whether device is open."
   - ReferenceId: "dataType": "Hash", "range": "Unique", "description": "Unique reference ID."
   - PrefabHash: "dataType": "Hash", "range": "CRC32", "description": "Device type hash."
   - NameHash: "dataType": "Hash", "range": "CRC32", "description": "Custom name hash."
   - TotalMoles: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+", "description": "Total gas moles in device."
   - Combustion: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Whether combustion is occurring."
   - Lock: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Device lock state."
   - Activate: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Trigger device activation."
   - Error: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device has an error."
   - Maximum: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+", "description": "Maximum capacity or setting value."
   - Charge: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+ J", "description": "Current charge in Joules."
   - PowerPotential: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+ W", "description": "Potential power generation or supply."
   - PowerActual: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0+ W", "description": "Actual power being generated or consumed."
   - Idle: "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 when device is idle."
   - Horizontal: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-360", "description": "Horizontal angle in degrees."
   - Vertical: "dataType": "Float", "range": "-90 to 90", "description": "Vertical angle in degrees."
   - Color: "dataType": "Integer", "range": "0-11", "description": "Color index."

3. For Ratio types (gas/liquid), use this pattern:
   - Ratio: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Ratio of contents (0-100%)."
   - RatioOxygen: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Oxygen ratio in internal atmosphere."
   - RatioOxygenOutput: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Oxygen ratio at output."
   - (Same pattern for: Nitrogen, CarbonDioxide, Volatiles, Water, Pollutant, NitrousOxide, Hydrogen, Steam, PollutedWater)
   - RatioLiquidOxygen: "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Liquid oxygen ratio."
   - (Same pattern for all Liquid variants)

4. For Device-Specific Types, search source code and verify:
   - **AreaPowerControl Mode**: Check AreaPowerControl.cs - Mode values are: 0=Idle, 1=Discharged, 2=Discharging, 3=Charging, 4=Charged (read-only, shows battery state)
   - **BatteryMedium Mode**: Check Battery.cs - Mode values are: 0=Empty, 1=Critical, 2=VeryLow, 3=Low, 4=Medium, 5=High, 6=Full (read-only charge state)
   - **LiquidTurboVolumePump Mode**: Check source - likely pump direction
   - **ManualHatch Mode**: Check source - likely Operate/Logic modes
   - **HydroponicsStation Setting**: Target temperature for growing
   - **LiquidTankSmallInsulated Setting**: Target temperature
   - **LiquidTurboVolumePump Setting**: Flow rate
   - **ManualHatch Setting**: Open percentage
   - **SliderDiode2 Setting**: Slider value
   - **LiquidValve Setting**: Flow rate
   - **PassiveLargeRadiatorGas Setting**: Target temperature
   - **Autolathe RecipeHash/CompletionRatio/ClearMemory/ExportCount/ImportCount/Reagents/StackSize**: Fabrication-specific logic
   - **Telescope celestial tracking types**: AlignmentError, CelestialHash, CelestialParentHash, DistanceAu, DistanceKm, Eccentricity, HorizontalRatio, Inclination, OrbitPeriod, SemiMajorAxis, TrueAnomaly, VerticalRatio
   - **BatchSlotReader Setting**: Read-only slot index being read
   - **SolarPanel45 Ratio**: Solar efficiency ratio
   - **EmergencyButton3x3 Setting**: Read-only activation count

Read source code files in Assembly-CSharp/ to verify device-specific types. Work autonomously.

Output the complete JSON to: `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/review-batch-11-complete.json`

Format:
```json
[
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureHydroponicsStation",
    "displayName": "Hydroponics Station",
    "prefabHash": 1441767298,
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "..." },
      ... ALL 42 logic types with descriptions
    }
  },
  ... all 17 devices
]
```

Work autonomously. Read the source code. Complete ALL devices before responding.
```


</details></tool-use>

  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureGroundBasedTelescope",
    "displayName": "Telescope",
    "prefabHash": -619745681,
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered."
      },
      "On": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Device on/off state."
      },
      "RequiredPower": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ W",
        "description": "Power draw in watts."
      },
      "Open": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Whether device cover is open."
      },
      "Lock": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Device lock state."
      },
      "Error": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Returns 1 if device has an error."
      },
      "Activate": {
        "dataType": "Boolean",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Trigger device activation."
      },
      "Horizontal": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-360",
        "description": "Horizontal angle in degrees."
      },
      "HorizontalRatio": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Horizontal angle as ratio (0-1 for 0-360 degrees)."
      },
      "Vertical": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "-90 to 90",
        "description": "Vertical angle in degrees."
      },
      "VerticalRatio": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Vertical angle as ratio (0-1 for -90 to 90 degrees)."
      },
      "AlignmentError": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+",
        "description": "Angular error between telescope aim and tracked celestial body."
      },
      "CelestialHash": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "CRC32",
        "description": "Hash of the currently tracked celestial body."
      },
      "CelestialParentHash": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "CRC32",
        "description": "Hash of the parent body of tracked celestial."
      },
      "DistanceAu": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ AU",
        "description": "Distance to tracked celestial in astronomical units."
      },
      "DistanceKm": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ km",
        "description": "Distance to tracked celestial in kilometers."
      },
      "Eccentricity": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-1",
        "description": "Orbital eccentricity of tracked celestial."
      },
      "Inclination": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-360",
        "description": "Orbital inclination of tracked celestial in degrees."
      },
      "OrbitPeriod": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ s",
        "description": "Orbital period of tracked celestial in seconds."
      },
      "SemiMajorAxis": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0+ m",
        "description": "Semi-major axis of tracked celestial's orbit in meters."
      },
      "TrueAnomaly": {
        "dataType": "Float",
        "range": "0-360",
        "description": "True anomaly of tracked celestial in degrees."
      },
      "PrefabHash": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "CRC32",
        "description": "Device type hash."
      },
      "ReferenceId": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "Unique",
        "description": "Unique reference ID."
      },
      "NameHash": {
        "dataType": "Hash",
        "range": "CRC32",
        "description": "Custom name hash."
      }
    }
  },
